name: Hermes Agent
short_desc: Hermes AI agent tool, delivered as a browser terminal (PLACEHOLDER — set real image).
author: Starway
description: PLACEHOLDER ENTRY. Hermes is an AI agent tool to be packaged for the Starway store. If it exposes a web UI, replace this with a normal service + internal_port. If it is a CLI, wrap it with a ttyd web terminal (see openclaw). To enable: set the real `image:`, flip `available` to true, and bump `tipi_version`.
